solutions.title: Solution (elizarov)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val n
=
readLine
()!!.
toInt
()
val a
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toLong
()
}
val answer
=
a
.
sortedDescending
().
withIndex
().
maxOf
{
(
it
.
index
+
1
)
*
it
.
value
}
println
(
answer
)
}
}
